nodes.summary: reconcile_eso_runtime_secrets.sh must not exit non-zero on kustomize apply failure when RUNTIME_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED=false
reconcile_argocd_repo_credentials.sh must accept gho_ tokens without a reconcile issue
When RUNTIME_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED=true and kustomize apply fails, the script must exit non-zero
reconcile_eso_runtime_secrets.sh must always write its state file before exiting
Fix must not affect dry-run mode
RUNTIME_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED=false + kustomize apply failure => status=warn-and-skip, exit 0
RUNTIME_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED=true + kustomize apply failure => status=failed-required, exit non-zero
gho_ token does not add a reconcile issue in reconcile_argocd_repo_credentials.sh
gho_ token emits an INFO log about PAT preference
Structural test asserts run_kustomize_apply is wrapped in 'if !' guard
Structural test asserts gho_ does not trigger record_reconcile_issue
